channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Go (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Go nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🐹 sipeed/picoclaw (22148 ⭐)

item.description:
👤 Owner: ValkDB

📝 Repository: ValkDB/postgresparser

📄 Descrizione: ANTLR-based PostgreSQL query parser for Go. Extracts tables, columns, joins, CTEs, parameters, DDL actions, and full column-usage metadata from SQL into a structured IR.
